positive: Stylized cosmic woodland scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and geometric abstract forest elements set against a deep indigo and violet nebula backdrop. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, emphasizing clean silhouettes and stark contrast. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep blacks, glowing teal, lavender, and electric coral accents. The art style should emulate polished, vector-graphic illustration mixed with Art Deco cosmic patterns, ensuring clear lines and flat fields of color suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on stylized mountain peaks meeting abstract celestial swirls. Minimal detail, maximum visual impact. Perfect for a central print placement.
